caption: The video captures a man standing at a podium, addressing an audience in what appears to be a formal or semi-formal setting. He is wearing a white shirt with a black vest that features intricate embroidery and a red emblem, suggesting a cultural or traditional significance. The man is speaking into a microphone, and his expression indicates he is engaged in delivering a speech or presentation. The audience, seated in front of him, is attentively listening, with some individuals turning their heads slightly as if reacting to his words. The background consists of wooden blinds covering large windows, adding to the indoor ambiance of the venue. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the organization or event associated with the gathering.
